compiled_state.title: test-merge-to-main: structural test uses source-file-grepping pattern (pre-existing anti-pattern)

compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: test_sync_phase_resets_stale_ahead_local_main and other structural tests in test-merge-to-main.sh use sed+grep on the script source file to verify implementation patterns, violating behavioral testing Rule 3. Pre-existing pattern in the file (4+ existing tests use same approach).
File: tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh
Category: verification

comments.body: Triaged (debug-everything): test-file anti-pattern (Rule 5 or change-detector). Requires careful per-test conversion or deletion. Deferred to end-of-session user review.
comments.author: Test
